head-uncommon-height1_strength1.name: Cloud Crown
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.flavourText: Floating headwear that makes you feel lighter AND heavier somehow.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.imageDesc: A fluffy white cotton-candy-like crown that hovers slightly above the head. Made of puffy cumulus cloud shapes stacked in a tiered crown design. Soft blue accents peek through the cotton. Silver trim at the edges.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.colors: white, light blue, silver, golden yellow

head-uncommon-height1_strength1.name: Rocket Helmet
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.flavourText: Red hot propulsion headgear. Go fast, stand tall, defy physics.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.imageDesc: A sleek chrome and red rocket-shaped helmet with pointed nosecone. Metallic silver body with red racing stripes down the sides. Three small circular exhaust ports at the back releasing stylized flame patterns in orange and yellow.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.colors: chrome silver, fire red, orange, deep blue

head-uncommon-height1_strength1.name: Rhino Helm
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.flavourText: Charging with confidence. Horns included, bruises not guaranteed.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.imageDesc: A heavy armor helm shaped like a rhinoceros head. Dark gray metallic plating with a prominent curved horn protruding forward. Textured grooves etched into the metal mimic rhino skin patterns.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.colors: gunmetal gray, dark brown, bronze, shadow black

head-uncommon-height1_strength1.name: Wizard's Peak
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.flavourText: Pointy hat science: the higher you go, the stronger you get.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.imageDesc: A tall, elegant conical wizard's hat in deep purple velvet with golden star and moon embroidery scattered across its surface. A wide brim decorated with intricate gold threading forming mystical runes.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.colors: deep purple, gold, crystal blue, silver

head-uncommon-height1_strength1.name: Sunflower Helm
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.flavourText: Be strong and bright. Also, bees might follow you.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.imageDesc: A cheerful helmet designed like an enormous sunflower bloom. Large golden-yellow petals radiate outward from a dark brown center disk. Thick dark green stem wraps around as a chin strap with detailed leaf textures.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.colors: golden yellow, dark brown, forest green, lime accent

head-uncommon-height1_strength1.name: Dragon Scale Crown
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.flavourText: Wear reptilian royalty. Becomes shinier when you win.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.imageDesc: A regal crown made of overlapping emerald-green dragon scales. Each scale has iridescent shimmering effects and detailed ridge patterns. Gold trim frames the base and connects scale segments.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.colors: emerald green, gold, ruby red, amethyst purple

head-uncommon-height1_strength1.name: Bowling Ball Brain
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.flavourText: It's heavy, it's round, it makes strikes happen.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.imageDesc: A black and white bowling ball-style helmet with finger holes sized appropriately at the front. Glossy polished finish with a diamond-shaped white patch on the back. Red and yellow swirled patterns accent the sides.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.colors: jet black, glossy white, crimson red, golden yellow

head-uncommon-height1_strength1.name: Viking Thunderhorn
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.flavourText: Twin horns, unbridled confidence, legendary hair volume.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.imageDesc: A classic Viking helm with two large curved horns extending diagonally outward and slightly upward. Brushed steel metallic body with hammered texture covering the surface. Gold inlay follows the horn curves.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.colors: brushed steel, brass gold, fiery red-orange, bronze

head-uncommon-height1_strength1.name: Jellyfish Crown
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.flavourText: Float tall, sting strong, confuse defenders completely.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.imageDesc: A translucent aqua and purple jellyfish-inspired helmet with a domed transparent top. Long flowing tentacles in gradient purple-to-pink hang down from the sides and back. Bioluminescent spots glow softly in blues and purples throughout.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.colors: aqua transparent, gradient purple, glowing cyan, soft pink

head-uncommon-height1_strength1.name: Anvil Helmet
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.flavourText: Heavy as sin, sturdy as legend. Take hits and keep playing.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.imageDesc: A solid iron anvil-shaped helmet with the characteristic broad flat top and tapered horn at the back. Aged metallic gray with darker scorch marks and soot stains.
head-uncommon-height1_strength1.colors: iron gray, charcoal black, burnt orange, metallic silver

head-uncommon-height1_passing1.name: Giraffe Visor
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.flavourText: Long necks see further. So do long heads.
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.imageDesc: a tan and brown headband with a stretchy giraffe neck pattern extending upward, covered in brown spots and safari-style details

head-uncommon-height1_passing1.name: Antenna Arrows
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.flavourText: These antennas point exactly where to kick.
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.imageDesc: a sleek black headband with two metallic arrow-shaped antennas jutting from the top, glowing with blue direction lines

head-uncommon-height1_passing1.name: Cloud Crown
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.flavourText: Floats high above the field. Literally.
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.imageDesc: a fluffy white and light blue headband designed like a puffy cloud with wispy strands, looks soft and dreamy

head-uncommon-height1_passing1.name: Peacock Plume
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.flavourText: Eyes on the back of your head? Sure.
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.imageDesc: an iridescent headband with colorful peacock feathers fanning out from the crown, each feather detailed with eye patterns
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.colors: emerald green, sapphire blue, purple, gold

head-uncommon-height1_passing1.name: Telescope Top
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.flavourText: Sees the future. Mostly just the goal.
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.imageDesc: a brass and copper headpiece resembling a telescope with a leather adjustment band, detailed vintage pipe fittings
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.colors: brass gold, copper brown, dark leather

head-uncommon-height1_passing1.name: Rocket Helm
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.imageDesc: a bright red and silver helmet shaped like a rocket ship with flame exhausts on the sides, pointed nose cone on top

head-uncommon-height1_passing1.name: Owl Oracle
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.flavourText: Wise owls know where to pass. Obviously.
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.imageDesc: a brown and tan headband with a wise owl face on the front, oversized round eyes with golden iris details
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.colors: warm brown, tan, golden yellow, dark brown

head-uncommon-height1_passing1.name: Satellite Spike
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.imageDesc: a futuristic black headband with angular geometric spike projections topped with glowing white satellite dishes

head-uncommon-height1_passing1.name: Compass Crown
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.flavourText: Always points the right way to pass.
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.imageDesc: a golden headband with a large compass rose design on the front and directional cardinal markings etched around
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.colors: gold, cream white, navy blue, rose gold

head-uncommon-height1_passing1.name: Lighthouse Loop
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.flavourText: Your passes shine bright enough to guide ships.
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.imageDesc: a striped red and white headband with a tiny rotating beacon light on top, detailed with nautical rope patterns
head-uncommon-height1_passing1.colors: bright red, white, golden yellow, navy blue

head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.name: Cloud Crown
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.flavourText: Float higher, shoot straighter. Mostly clouds.
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.imageDesc: a fluffy white crown woven from actual cumulus clouds with silver lightning bolts crackling around the edges

head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.name: Archer's Antlers
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.flavourText: Deer aren't known for shooting, but these are.
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.imageDesc: a headband with oversized bronze antlers that curve upward with target reticles etched along each point

head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.name: Sniper Sombrero
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.flavourText: Mexican hat of precision. Goal scorer's delight.
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.imageDesc: a wide brimmed sombrero with red and gold embroidery, featuring a built-in scope lens on one side
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.colors: deep red, gold thread, metallic gray

head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.name: Rocket Head Wrap
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.flavourText: Your head becomes a guided missile. Metaphorically.
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.imageDesc: a sleek crimson headwrap with silver rocket fins protruding from the sides and flame designs

head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.name: Eagle's Eye Helm
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.flavourText: See your target from a mile away. Hit it from one.
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.imageDesc: a golden helmet shaped like an eagle's head with piercing yellow eyes and feather detailing

head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.name: Pineapple Spike Cap
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.flavourText: Spiky fruit energy powers your head-to-goal shots.
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.imageDesc: a yellow and orange cap shaped like a pineapple with textured diamond patterns and spiky leafy crown on top

head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.name: Comet Circlet
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.flavourText: A tiny space rock orbits your skull. Goals follow.
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.imageDesc: a thin metallic circlet with a glowing comet trailing luminescent tail arcing overhead

head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.name: Archer Knight's Crown
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.flavourText: Medieval meets modern. Arrows optional but encouraged.
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.imageDesc: a pointed crown made of shimmering steel with archer symbols and crossbow designs along the rim

head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.name: Peacock Plume Mask
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.flavourText: Showing off has never been more effective.
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.imageDesc: an ornate mask with iridescent peacock feathers fanning out from the sides in shades of turquoise and violet

head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.name: Asteroid Headgear
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.flavourText: Literally wear a space rock. Physics don't apply here.
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.imageDesc: a bulky gray and black helmet shaped like a jagged asteroid chunk with impact craters and a glowing impact point
head-uncommon-height1_shooting1.colors: charcoal gray, slate black, electric blue

head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.name: Owl Crown
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.flavourText: Those giant eyes see everything. Even the sneaky goals.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.imageDesc: A whimsical crown made from interlocking feathers in cream and brown, with exaggerated round owl eyes embedded on the front. The crown has three peaks resembling owl ears. Feather texture throughout with subtle gold trim along the base.

head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.name: Giraffe Helm
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.flavourText: Extra height from your new tall friend. They're very supportive.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.imageDesc: A headband with a small 3D giraffe head sticking up from the crown, with a long neck extending upward. The giraffe is orange-yellow with brown spot patches. The headband itself is tan leather with a brown geometric pattern.

head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.name: Mercury Wings
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.flavourText: You're basically telepathic now. Also slightly dizzy.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.imageDesc: A Roman-inspired helmet with small silver-white wings attached to both sides of the head. The wings shimmer with feather details. The helmet base is polished silver with teal accent stripes.

head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.name: Stilt-Walker's Crown
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.flavourText: Psychologically taller. Which is basically scientifically taller.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.imageDesc: A tall, striped top hat in bright pink and white stripes with a black base band. A small platform or pedestal-like extension rises from the crown. Decorated with tiny bells.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.colors: hot pink, white, black, light pink

head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.name: Hawk Headpiece
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.flavourText: Predator vision unlocked. RIP to the ball's sense of safety.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.imageDesc: A fierce hawk mask that covers the forehead and extends over the eyes with a sharp, pointed beak. Golden-brown feathers cover the skull area with white undertones. Fierce orange eyes and a hooked yellow beak.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.colors: golden brown, orange, dark brown, black

head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.name: Telescope Tiara
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.flavourText: You can see plays happening in the future. Probably. Maybe.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.imageDesc: A fancy tiara with a small brass telescope or spyglass mounted on top, pointing slightly forward. The base is ornate gold with crystalline gems embedded around the band.

head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.name: Dragon's Crescent
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.flavourText: A dragon's horn makes you mysterious and impossibly cool.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.imageDesc: A half-moon shaped headpiece with a single curved dragon horn extending upward from the center. The crescent is deep crimson red with gold dragon scale texturing. The horn is iridescent.

head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.name: Springy Antenna
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.flavourText: Boinging with pure reflex power. Also just fun to boing.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.imageDesc: A headband with two large spiral antennae sticking up. Each antenna is bright lime green with a springy, coiled appearance. The headband is neon yellow with small polka dots. Tips have tiny metallic ball bearings.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.colors: lime green, neon yellow, silver, hot pink

head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.name: Flamingo Feather Crown
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.flavourText: Pretty AND reflexive. The ball never knows what hit it.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.imageDesc: A crown made of long, flowing hot pink flamingo feathers arranged in a dramatic arc above the head. Feathers have white and coral accents at the tips. A thin gold band serves as the base, studded with small pearls.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.colors: hot pink, light pink, gold, white

head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.name: Lightning Crest
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.flavourText: Static electricity makes your reflexes literally spark.
head-uncommon-height1_reflexes1.imageDesc: A jagged lightning bolt that forms a crest along the top of the head, crackling with energy. Base color is electric blue with bright yellow highlights. Small bolts branch off from the main crest. The headband underneath is sleek black.

head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.name: Fortress Visor
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.flavourText: Block passes AND throw them harder. Double trouble!
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.imageDesc: A sleek sports visor with reinforced steel plating across the brow and temple areas. Metallic silver with emerald-green trim along the edges. Features a small castle icon embossed in the center.

head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.name: Thunder Crown
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.flavourText: Wearing lightning that passes through defenses with electric power.
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.imageDesc: A crown-like headpiece made of golden metal with jagged lightning bolt spikes protruding upward. Electric blue arcs crackle between the spikes with white highlights.

head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.name: Anchor Brain
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.flavourText: Steady passes meet unshakeable strength. You're grounded, literally.
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.imageDesc: A nautical-themed headband with a rope-texture weave in navy blue and white. A large golden anchor is mounted on the front center, with chain-link patterns bordering the sides.

head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.name: Phoenix Helm
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.flavourText: Rise from tackles and pass like you're made of fire and fury.
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.imageDesc: A mythical helmet shaped like a phoenix head with outstretched wings on both sides. Flames in shades of orange, red, and yellow cover the surface with golden accents.

head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.name: Octopus Cap
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.flavourText: Eight arms mean eight passing options and way more tackles!
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.imageDesc: A whimsical helmet covered in eight springy octopus tentacles in shades of purple and pink. Each tentacle has suction cups with white and pink details.

head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.name: Meteoric Medal
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.flavourText: A cosmic headpiece that passes perfectly and hits harder than gravity.
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.imageDesc: A helmet shaped like a meteor with trailing space dust effects. Dark gray and black base with metallic silver streaks running across it like a comet's tail.

head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.name: Volcano Bonnet
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.flavourText: Explosive passes meet molten strength in this bubbly head-gear!
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.imageDesc: A helmet shaped like a volcano with ridged layers in volcanic gray and charcoal. Orange and red lava colors flow down the sides with glowing yellow highlights.

head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.name: Titanium Coconut
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.flavourText: Tropical toughness meets precision passing. Hang ten wins!
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.imageDesc: A headpiece resembling a coconut shell with a futuristic twist. Brown woven fiber texture with silver-metallic reinforcement bands crossing the surface.

head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.name: Prism Spike
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.flavourText: Rainbow-powered passes scattered with devastating strength spikes!
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.imageDesc: A sleek helmet with a tall geometric spike in the center made of prismatic crystal that refracts light into rainbow colors. The base helmet is white with iridescent coating.

head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.name: Muscle Mushroom
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.flavourText: A magical fungi cap that grows your passes AND your power-ups!
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.imageDesc: An oversized mushroom-shaped helmet in bright red and white spotted pattern. The cap is classic red with white circular spots. A muscular bicep symbol embroidered in gold thread on the red surface.
head-uncommon-passing1_strength1.colors: bright red, white, pale cream, gold

head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.name: Bullseye Beret
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.flavourText: Dapper AND deadly accurate to the post.
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.imageDesc: classic black beret with a bright red bullseye target printed on the front, accented with gold crosshairs and small shooting star embroideries

head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.name: Sledgehammer Helm
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.flavourText: Shaped like the tool. Hits like it too.
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.imageDesc: oversized gray metal helmet designed to look like a sledgehammer head, with a wooden-look band across the bottom and dents showing impact history

head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.name: Phoenix Plumage Crown
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.flavourText: Burning determination and deadly accuracy combined.
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.imageDesc: ornate crown with tall feathers in flame colors rising from a golden band, each feather tipped with glowing embers and swirling fire patterns
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.colors: gold, fiery orange, crimson red, deep purple

head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.name: Cannonball Cap
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.flavourText: Your head became a weapon. Refs are confused.
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.imageDesc: rounded steel cap shaped like a cannonball with fuse details, painted with crosshatch patterns and tiny explosion designs, mounted on a leather band

head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.name: Sniper's Scope Visor
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.flavourText: See the target, become the target.
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.imageDesc: tactical headband with a front-mounted brass scope-like attachment featuring concentric circles and crosshair engravings
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.colors: olive green, brass brown, reflective silver

head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.name: Meteor Spike Helm
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.flavourText: Fell from space. Scorched and pointy.
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.imageDesc: dark metallic helmet covered in jagged spikes of varying heights, with charred scorching and space dust texture all over

head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.name: Archer's Glory Headguard
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.flavourText: Ancient bowmasters reborn as your headgear.
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.imageDesc: leather headband with ornate wooden bow-shaped decorations on both sides, adorned with feather fletching, archery target symbols embossed on the front
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.colors: rich brown, tan gold, forest green

head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.name: Warhammer Headpiece
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.imageDesc: solid iron helmet with a wide domed crown, featuring embossed hammer head designs down the front and thick leather straps with metal studs
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.colors: deep iron gray, copper orange, aged leather brown

head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.name: Comet Crest Cap
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.flavourText: You're a shooting star. The ball follows.
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.imageDesc: sleek white and blue cap with a tall comet tail swooshing from front to back, trails of sparkles and light streaks embedded
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.colors: pearl white, cobalt blue, glowing silver

head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.name: Titan's Crowned Helm
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.flavourText: Built for giants. Works on kids too.
head-uncommon-shooting1_strength1.imageDesc: massive bronze-tinted helmet with towering rectangular crown designs resembling ancient warrior royalty, etched with muscle patterns and power symbols

head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.name: Tornado Crown
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.flavourText: Spins so fast your head becomes a blur of reflexes and power.
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.imageDesc: A spiral-shaped crown made of swirling wind patterns, with white and cyan swirls forming a vortex. Golden crown rim at the base with little lightning bolts crackling around it.

head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.name: Comet Helmet
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.flavourText: Streaks across the field leaving a trail of impressive plays.
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.imageDesc: A sleek, aerodynamic helmet shaped like a comet with a fiery tail. The front is polished silver with a pointed visor, and a bright orange and yellow tail flows backward.

head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.name: Viking Beetlebrow
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.flavourText: Thick brow armor makes you look both scary and hilariously grumpy.
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.imageDesc: An oversized bronze helmet with exaggerated beetle-like mandible protection over the eyebrows. Spiky ridges run along the top like a real beetle's carapace.

head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.name: Pineapple Power
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.flavourText: Spiky and sweet — stronger than it looks, faster than it tastes.
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.imageDesc: A bright yellow headgear shaped like a pineapple with green leafy crown on top. The body is covered in raised diamond pattern bumps in yellow and light green.
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.colors: bright yellow, lime green, golden yellow, cream

head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.name: Dragon Scale Crown
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.flavourText: Each scale glimmers with ancient dragon power and quick reflexes.
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.imageDesc: A crown made entirely of overlapping iridescent scales in purple and teal. Scales are shiny with metallic reflections. Red gemstone centerpiece on the forehead.

head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.name: Rocket Goggles
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.flavourText: Jet-powered vision means you see plays 0.5 seconds before they happen.
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.imageDesc: Oversized retro-futuristic goggles with dome-shaped lenses glowing neon blue. Twin exhaust ports on either side. Chrome metal frame with rivets.
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.colors: chrome silver, neon blue, orange, red

head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.name: Meteor Cap
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.flavourText: Hit the field with the impact of a space rock nobody saw coming.
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.imageDesc: A cap-style helmet textured like a rough meteorite with dark gray and black swirled stone texture. Streaks of bright orange and yellow run across it like re-entry burn marks.

head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.name: Falcon Sight
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.flavourText: Eyes like a hunting bird means faster reflexes, stronger instincts.
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.imageDesc: A headband with a carved wooden falcon's head mounted on the front, fierce expression. Feather-like ridges radiate outward. Gold and brown wood tones.

head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.name: Thunder Crown Tiara
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.flavourText: Crackling with power — you're royalty and a lightning bolt at once.
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.imageDesc: An elegant tiara with jagged lightning bolt points instead of traditional spikes. Bright yellow and white lightning bolts branch upward from a golden band.

head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.name: Bouncy Bubble Helm
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.flavourText: Bounces on impact — your head's stronger than their kick.
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.imageDesc: A translucent bubble-shaped helmet with a glossy, reflective surface. Iridescent gradient from light pink to light blue with rainbow shine effects.
head-uncommon-reflexes1_strength1.colors: light pink, light blue, white, iridescent rainbow

head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.name: Lucky Headbutt Helm
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.flavourText: Rams win all their header battles. Sometimes unintentionally.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.imageDesc: A bronze-colored metal helmet shaped like a ram's head with curved horns. The helmet has a dented center and sports glowing golden runes along the forehead.

head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.name: Sneaky Pickpocket Cap
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.flavourText: Steals the ball AND your snacks. You won't notice until halftime.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.imageDesc: A purple jester's cap with three points, each topped with a tiny golden bell. A mischievous grin is embroidered on the front in black thread.

head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.name: Thunderstrike Circlet
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.flavourText: Makes your hair stand on end. Literally charges your shots.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.imageDesc: A glowing electric blue circlet made of interlocking lightning bolts forming a crown. Jagged edges spark with white-hot electricity. The center gem radiates bright cyan light.

head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.name: Dragon Egg Tophat
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.flavourText: Wears a dragon egg. The dragon inside cheers when you score.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.imageDesc: A tall formal top hat made of black silk with a massive iridescent dragon egg sitting on top. The egg has scales texture in deep purples and greens with hints of orange.

head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.name: Fuzzy Dice Headwrap
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.flavourText: Roll the dice, not the ball. Every game's a gamble with style.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.imageDesc: A soft pink headwrap with oversized fuzzy dice sewn all over it. Each die shows different numbers with bold white dots. Rainbow-colored ribbons trail from the back.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.colors: hot pink, white, rainbow pastels, gold sparkle

head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.name: Strongman's Flower Crown
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.flavourText: Proves real strength is beautiful. Enemies underestimate you every time.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.imageDesc: A delicate crown woven from thick thorny vines and vibrant oversized flowers in red, pink, and orange. Golden rope reinforces the structure.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.colors: emerald green, crimson, golden yellow, soft pink

head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.name: Rocket Pop Helmet
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.flavourText: Your head smells like dessert. Also, you can now fly slightly.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.imageDesc: A helmet shaped like a giant popsicle with vertical stripes of red, white, and blue. Shiny glaze effect covers the surface. A stick protrudes from the back.

head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.name: Bamboo Panda Helm
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.flavourText: Cute AND powerful. Opponents keep trying to take selfies instead of defending.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.imageDesc: A round white helmet designed like a cute giant panda's face with black patches around the eyes. Stalks of bamboo cross in an X pattern on the helmet.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.colors: white, black, soft green, pale pink

head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.name: Chaotic Cheese Crown
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.flavourText: Made of real cheese. It smells questionable but works amazingly.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.imageDesc: A jagged crown carved entirely from yellow and orange cheddar cheese with holes in it. Small mice emerge from cheese holes looking shocked.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.colors: cheddar yellow, orange, pale tan, dark brown

head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.name: Comet Tail Headband
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.flavourText: A comet crashed on your head. Now you're supernaturally fast AND lucky.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.imageDesc: A sleek metallic silver headband with a comet-shaped center piece made of glowing purple crystals. A long tail of shimmering stardust streams behind it.
head-uncommon-luck1_strength1.colors: metallic silver, purple crystal, cosmic blue, golden white
